info.description: Unified API for authentication, polls, contacts, and file management.
info.title: Polling System API

post.description: Authenticates a user with email/password via Firebase Auth, provisions the user if new, and returns the user profile with tokens.
Verifies the Firebase ID token (via middleware), provisions the user if new, and returns the user profile.
post.summary: Exchange Firebase token for user profile

get.description: Returns a paginated list of candidates, filtered by poll_id.
Returns a paginated list of all answers submitted by a candidate.

delete.description: Deletes a candidate and its answers. Requires ownership of the parent poll for pollers.

patch.description: Partially updates a candidate. Requires ownership of the parent poll for pollers.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts, optionally filtered by file_id, poll_id, name, or phone number.

post.description: Creates a new contact. Phone normalization is calculated automatically.
Creates multiple contacts from a list of phone numbers for a specific poll. Duplicates and invalid numbers are skipped and reported.

delete.description: Permanently removes a contact from the database.

patch.description: Updates the name and/or phone number of an existing contact. Phone normalization is recalculated automatically.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of uploaded CSV files.

post.description: Parses the CSV, saves the file to disk, and creates contact records in the database. The uploading user is determined from the auth token.
post.summary: Upload a CSV file of contacts

get.description: Returns a paginated list of polls, optionally filtered by status.

post.description: Creates a new poll. Sets created_by from the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a single poll with its creator.

delete.description: Deletes a poll and all its candidates, questions, and answers (cascade). Admin only.

patch.description: Partially updates a poll. Admins can update any poll; pollers can only update their own.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of candidates for the given poll.

post.description: Adds a candidate to a poll. Requires poll ownership for pollers.
Creates candidates from a list of phone numbers. Deduplicates and normalizes phones.
post.summary: Bulk add candidates to a poll

post.description: Parses a CSV file with a 'phone' column and creates candidates for the poll. Deduplicates and normalizes phones.
post.summary: Upload CSV to bulk add candidates

get.description: Returns a paginated list of questions for the given poll.

post.description: Adds a question to a poll. Requires poll ownership for pollers.

delete.description: Deletes a question and its answers. Requires ownership of the parent poll for pollers.

patch.description: Partially updates a question. Requires ownership of the parent poll for pollers.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of answers for the given question.

post.description: Submits an answer from a candidate. Each candidate can answer a question only once.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all users. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a user manually. Admin only.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's display name.

get.description: Returns a user by database ID. Admin only.

patch.description: Updates a user's role. Admin only.

BearerAuth.description: Enter your token in the format: Bearer {token}
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
